summary: Live-applied ADR 0296 from the exact-main release tree by replaying `artifact-cache-lv3` as VM 180 on 10.10.10.80, converging the dedicated private cache plane with the current repo-derived 51-image warm set, moving `docker-build-lv3` onto those dedicated cache endpoints through the governed wrapper path, and promoting the canonical receipt and truth surfaces that now match repo version 0.177.103 and platform version 0.130.69.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest -q tests/test_artifact_cache_runtime_role.py tests/test_artifact_cache_playbook.py tests/test_common_docker_bridge_chains_helper.py tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py tests/test_post_verify_tasks.py` returned `19 passed in 0.22s`, and `make syntax-check-artifact-cache-vm` also succeeded from the exact-main release tree.

verification.check: Exact-main repository automation and validation paths
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py validate --inventory inventory/hosts.yml`, the scoped `playbooks/services/build-artifact-cache.yml --syntax-check` replay, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/platform_manifest.py --check`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, and `git diff --check` all succeeded after the canonical receipt and truth surfaces were promoted; the remote pre-push gate then uncovered stale generated docs, which were cleared by rerunning `uv run --with jsonschema python3 scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_diagrams.py --write`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-docs`.

`make configure-artifact-cache-vm env=production` succeeded from repo version `0.177.103`, finishing with final recap `artifact-cache-lv3 : ok=118 changed=8 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=7 rescued=0 ignored=0` and `proxmox-host : ok=14 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=3 rescued=0 ignored=0`.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=build-artifact-cache env=production EXTRA_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true'` completed end to end from the exact-main release tree, including the canonical-truth gate, with final recap `docker-build-lv3 : ok=127 changed=11 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=18 rescued=0 ignored=0`.

Fresh post-replay verification confirmed VM `180` is running with the declared IP and MAC, `artifact-cache-lv3` serves all four cache ports locally, `/opt/artifact-cache/seed-plan.json` now contains the current repo-derived `51` warmable images, Docker on the cache guest trusts `10.10.10.80:5001-5004`, `docker-build-lv3` points its Docker mirrors and insecure registries at those dedicated endpoints, `docker buildx inspect lv3-cache --bootstrap` succeeds, and the old local `artifact-cache-*` containers remain absent from the build guest.

notes: This canonical mainline receipt supersedes the earlier branch-local receipt for latest-receipt promotion, while preserving the branch-local receipt as pre-integration audit history.

The exact-main replay surfaced a repo-derived warm-set increase from the earlier branch-local 50 images to 51 images because the synchronized catalog set now includes the Apache Tika image introduced by ADR 0275.

The exact live apply was executed from source commit e95d5d9a0d92892b48ca66400a9935f25e4e492d; the final integration commit only promotes the canonical receipt, ADR metadata, and generated truth surfaces without changing the live automation logic that was replayed.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces` now fails by design on this branch because the validator rejects branch mappings to terminal workstream states such as `live_applied`; the earlier non-terminal branch-local pass remains in the audit trail, and the promoted truth is intended for `main` rather than further branch-local mutation.

correction_loop.repair_action: Switched the Docker publication-assurance helper source from a playbook-dir-relative path to an inventory-dir-relative path in both the shared Docker role and the shared post-verify task so nested service playbooks under playbooks/services can install the helper correctly.
correction_loop.verification: The exact-main focused pytest slice, syntax check, dedicated cache guest replay, governed build-artifact-cache wrapper path, and end-to-end verification all succeeded after the helper-path repair.
